title: DecisionResponse
description: The result of an authorization evaluation returned by the EnforcementPoint. The request_id echoes the corresponding DecisionRequest for correlation.

request_id.description: Echoes the request_id from the corresponding DecisionRequest.

outcome.description: The authorization decision. 'allow': proceed. 'deny': reject. 'not_applicable': no policy covered the request (enforcement point should treat as deny).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the outcome. For allow: brief confirmation. For deny: what was required vs. what the subject held.

evaluated_by.description: Name of the policy or component that produced this decision. Appears in audit records.

policy_version.description: Version identifier of the policy set in effect at evaluation time. Used to correlate decisions with the policy configuration that produced them.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the decision was produced.
